title: Cursed Life - The witch's curse!
description: You were cursed by a witch! The curse constantly tries to kill you, and you need to do something about it!
body:
![Cursed Life- The witch's curse! Banner image](https://i.imgur.com/rWF8672.png)

You were cursed by a witch! The curse constantly tries to kill you, and you need to do something about it!
You need to gather the ingredients, get to the witche's brewing room, activate the brewing cauldron and get yourself from all the trouble!
# 
This datapack was made for the [PlanetMinecraft's Haloween Datapack Jam](https://www.planetminecraft.com/jam/halloween-dp/)!
# 
The curse constantly tries to kill you, from turning all water into lava, to spawning an undead army of skeletons! You need to stop it by finding the right recipe for you from the witch and getting all the special ingredients!
# 
This dapack required a resource pack!
Do /reload when you join the game!
Version: 1.20.2

<details>
<summary>⚠️Spoiler⚠️| Stuck? Don't read for full experience</summary>
  
## DONT READ THIS IF YOU WANT FULL EXPERIENCE OF THE PACK
To get rid of the curse you need to find the new structure, which has a secret basement underneath. There in the book, you must boil the UN-Curse Potion. To get the ingrediesnt you need to:

| Image  | Item | Description |
| ------------- | ------------- | ------------- |
| ![Rotten Egg image](https://i.imgur.com/ZiRhHI4.png) | **Rotten Egg** | Drop an egg on a campfire, after a while it will explode into an rotten egg! |
| ![Moonlight Dust image](https://i.imgur.com/83UDqen.png) | **Moonlight Dust** | Dirty moonlight dust is dropped from skeletons, and needs to be washed in a cauldron to clean.
| ![Enderflame Petal image](https://i.imgur.com/zs8998V.png) | **Enderflame Petal** | Drop an enderpearl on a planted beetroat, and wait till it grows up(it will drop automaticly, dont break it!).|
| ![Squished Eye image](https://i.imgur.com/0Q5eghU.png) | **Squished Eye** | Drop an anvil onto an ender eye to make it squished.|
